decimals: detected from raw stored values (string decimal places, or float with 1e-6 relative tolerance); tick = gcd of values scaled by 10^decimals
dL2_der: canonical de-rounded L2 residual vs baseline_derounded_v2 (raw dL2 retired from the process space)
baseline_v2: seed 20260703 (identical draws to Build 03) + E[H2'|d]; keff' = H2'_null_w / H2'_obs
geometry_hygiene: no labels in pass/baseline/features/embedding/clustering/anomaly stages; overlays post-hoc only
